problem_statement: The current stock management process at the grocery store is highly disorganized, leading to inaccurate stock counts and the inability to identify when items have run out, causing potential delays in reordering and missed sales opportunities.
solution_overview: Develop a mobile-based barcode scanning system that allows for immediate stock deduction upon scanning items. The system will also include functionality to alert designated users (e.g., parents) via the Line application when specific items are running low, enabling timely reordering.
functional_requirements: Ability to scan item barcodes using a mobile device's camera.
Automatic decrement of stock levels upon scanning (e.g., during sale or stock removal).
Ability to set configurable low-stock thresholds for individual inventory items.
Automatic generation of real-time low-stock alerts when an item's quantity falls below its predefined threshold.
Integration with the Line Messaging API for sending low-stock notifications.
Ability to specify and manage recipients for Line notifications (e.g., 'parents').
Basic item master data management (e.g., item name, barcode, current stock).
non_functional_requirements: **Usability:** The mobile application must be intuitive and easy to use, especially for users who may not be highly tech-savvy.
**Reliability:** The system must accurately track stock levels and consistently send timely low-stock notifications.
**Performance:** Barcode scanning and stock updates should be fast and responsive.
**Security:** Inventory data and user information must be protected.
**Maintainability:** The system should be designed for ease of maintenance and future updates.
tech_stack_recommendation: **Mobile Application:** React Native (for cross-platform development on iOS and Android)
**Backend:** Node.js with Express.js (for API development and business logic)
**Database:** PostgreSQL (for robust and relational inventory data management)
**Barcode Scanning Library:** Mobile device camera APIs or dedicated React Native barcode scanner libraries.
**Notification Service:** Line Messaging API (for sending real-time alerts)
**Cloud Hosting:** AWS / Google Cloud Platform (for scalable and reliable backend deployment)
